verification_instructions: Run npx vite build and confirm it compiles without errors
environment_constraints: No tests - verification is via successful build only
key_patterns: i18n system: en.ts defines TranslationKey type, es.ts must match all keys. Log messages in gameLogic.ts and gameStore.ts are hardcoded strings (not using the i18n system). CSS is minified in a single line in App.css.
directory_structure: src/components/ has all React components, src/store/ has zustand store, src/utils/ has game logic, src/i18n/ has translations, src/types/ has TypeScript types
